description_long: This is a classic red fire extinguisher with a cylindrical metal body and a rounded top, featuring a prominent black hose attached near the top and looping upward. The extinguisher has a silver metal handle and lever mechanism at the top, along with a visible mounting bracket on the side for wall attachment. The front displays a white printed label with instructions, numbers, and symbols, making it easy to identify and use in emergencies. The hose is flexible and secured to the body with a clip, and the nozzle is positioned for quick deployment. The base is slightly raised with small feet for stability. The overall design is robust, functional, and intended for rapid access in urban environments.
description: A red cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black hose, silver handle, and a white instruction label on the front. It features a mounting bracket and a sturdy, practical design for emergency use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the mounting bracket and the hose running vertically along the body.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the black hose looped above the extinguisher and the silver handle mechanism.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the white instruction label, the handle, and the top-mounted hose.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the handle, the hose attachment, and the mounting bracket.
attribute_label_or_signage: White printed label with text and symbols on the front of the cylinder, rectangular in shape.
attribute_mounting_bracket_or_holder: A gray mounting bracket is attached to the side of the cylinder, designed for wall mounting.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black flexible hose is attached near the top, looping upward and secured with a clip; the nozzle is at the end of the hose.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin is visible at the top near the handle.
